name: CSV to Markdown table conversion
prompt: Convert this CSV file at ./data/sales.csv to markdown.
success_criteria: Produces properly aligned markdown table with headers
Handles special characters and quotes in data correctly
edge_cases: Very wide CSV (>50 columns) → may need horizontal scrolling or truncation
CSV with embedded commas in quoted fields → should be handled by parser
Non-UTF8 encoding → may produce garbled output, suggest specifying encoding
